appraisal_events.evidence: « je lus : “La princesse de Guermantes… sera chez elle…”… mon imagination… me peignait non ce que je savais, mais ce qu'elle voyait… le nom… m'avait toujours évoqué quelque chose de tout différent… je me figurais l'hôtel… fréquenté par… le grand Condé. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator’s imagination confers an extraordinary prestige on the princess purely from the name and title, even as he notes rationally that this is an illusion; the admiration is presented with ironic distance.

status_effects.explanation: She is momentarily elevated in the narrator’s eyes as an almost legendary figure, though the passage frames this as an imaginative, name-driven illusion.
